description: For tasks that ask an agent to review, audit, or assess an existing artifact — code, document, strategy, contract. Used across engineering (code review), quality, legal, and finance.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.description: Issues identified are concrete and locatable — specific line, claim, clause, or pattern — not general observations.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.description: Identified issues are real issues, not false positives. Severity ratings are calibrated to actual risk.

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.description: Each finding comes with a concrete remediation step, not just identification of the problem.

dimensions.name: domain_signal
dimensions.description: Demonstrates understanding of domain-specific risk — e.g. a security review that knows which CVE classes are relevant, a contract review that identifies jurisdiction-specific issues.
